nasb.text: For even if there are so-called gods whether in heaven or on earth, as indeed there are many gods and many lords,

esv.text: For although there may be so-called gods in heaven or on earth—as indeed there are many “gods” and many “lords”—

cnv.text: 雖然有被稱為神的，無論在天上或在地上，

ccb.text: 虽然天上地上有许多被称为神的，好像有许多神、许多主，

csbs.text: 因为，就算真有所谓的神明——无论在天上或在地上，好像有许多的“神”和许多的“主”——
